content.full_text:
TO: [x] JEANNE   [ ] JAY
    [ ] LYNN      [ ] BARBARA
    [ ] RICH     [ ] BOB S.
    [x] HELEN    [ ] OTHER Carla

FROM: Mary Ann
DATE: 7/2/84

[x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(IF YOU HAVE ANY COMMENTS, NOTIFY ADVISOR WITHIN 1 DAY)

FILE LOCATION:

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ]   NO [ ]

CALLER Various - over a period of time
REPRESENTING
PHONE NUMBER:

QUESTION: When a late contribution report is filed after the deadline for filing such reports (filed after June 6 or November 7) it is required that the late filing be sent by mailgram/telegram instead of first class mail--why?

ANSWER: It was decided at the opinion request meeting of 6/21/84, that late contribution reports filed after the date of the election may be sent by first class mail.
